items.project_definition: The interface exposing endpoints under /api/v1/ to handle requests and provide responses.
A learning offering owned by an instructor, containing a title, description, price in cents, published status, and ordered modules.
The mechanism used to secure password credentials during registration and authentication.
A relationship between a student and a learning offering that records progress and a completion date.
The requirement to store monetary values in cents to avoid floating point precision errors.
The data interchange format used for responses, following a specific envelope with data, meta, and errors fields.
A child record of a learning offering representing a lesson or section in a fixed sequence.
The architectural style governing the design of endpoints and resource interactions.
A shared account identity containing a role, email, password credential, and display name.
